digamma.title: DIGAMMA DIAGNOSTIC
geiger.title: Geiger Counter
item.hbm.black_hole.desc.3: It's not the end of the world.
item.hbm.conveyor_wand.desc: Click two points to create a conveyor route

item.hbm.settings_tool.desc1: Can copy the settings (filters, fluid ID, etc) of machines
item.hbm.settings_tool.desc2: Shift right-click to copy, right click to paste
item.hbm.settings_tool.desc3: Ctrl click on pipes to paste settings to multiple pipes
item.hbm.singularity_spark.desc.2: that pulses and tears space open.
item.hbm.template_folder.desc: Machine Templates: Paper + Dye$Press Stamps: Flat Stamp$Siren Tracks: Insulator + Steel Plate
item.hbm.toolbox.desc.open: Shift-click with the toolbox to open the toolbox.
item.hbm.toolbox.desc.swap: Click with the toolbox to swap hotbars in/out of the toolbox.
